extortion.description: CLIMAX, founded in 1966 and headquartered in Newberg, OR., is a provider of portable machining, welding, and testing systems to optimize performance, efficiency, and safety within the Oil & Gas, Mining & Heavy Construction, Power Generation, Shipbuilding & Repair, and Transportation industries. Employees: 136 Revenue: $40 Million Industry: Industrial Machinery    Phone Number:(503) 538-2185
